goal: 实现 Runtime Control Plane 收口计划

summary.title: 收口 sidepanel Runtime Control Plane 消费层
summary.what: 新增 sidepanel control-plane client，统一管理资源 bootstrap、management action payload 归一化和 action effect 投影；App.vue 改为只消费 client 返回的 state/effect，不再直接拼 resource.read/action message，也不再解析 skills.discover counts 或直连 runtime.capture_diagnostics。
summary.why: P0 目标是减少 MV3 UI 对运行态语义的所有权，让 UI 通过统一 Runtime Control Plane 消费 runtime/config/skills/hosts/intervention/diagnostics surface。
summary.user_goal: 实现 Runtime Control Plane 收口计划

decisions.chose: 按用户最新指令只完成 sidepanel Runtime Control Plane 消费层收口
decisions.rationale: 用户明确要求目标调整成只完成 P0，background route plan、P1/P2 不继续扩展。
rejected: 继续推进 background control-plane route plan
继续扩展 AI Surface / kernel / execution host 后续阶段

decisions.chose: 先做 framework-neutral client，而不是 Vue composable
decisions.rationale: client 能被测试直接覆盖，也让 App.vue 只保留 UI 状态和用户事件处理。

decisions.chose: 把 refresh、notice、counts、diagnosticsSnapshot 投影放进 client
decisions.rationale: 避免 App.vue 按 action kind 解析 runtime result，降低 UI 对产品运行态语义的 ownership。

review_notes: 验证通过：sidepanel-management.spec.ts、sidepanel-app.spec.ts、manifest targeted pattern、Biome focused check、tsc --noEmit、git diff --check。
本次没有修改 background.ts/runtime-services.ts，非 P0 的 background bridge 收口保留为后续工作。
提交为 7d6ecc5 refactor(sidepanel): 收口运行控制面消费。

architectural_claims: sidepanel management UI now consumes runtime control-plane through a dedicated client instead of app-local bootstrap/action dispatch logic
management bootstrap and action effect projection are testable outside App.vue
behavioral_changes: App.vue uses controlPlaneClient.bootstrap() for management resources
App.vue uses controlPlaneClient.runAction() for config/skills/hosts/intervention/runtime management actions
diagnostics copy path routes through the same control-plane client
